long_description:
[genctl-fleetman] Insufficient running pods for deployment is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/blob/d8db00be9e714e4b3fa6faf8a8ba5f32da939e26/pages/runbooks/fleet_deployment_not_running.md
TIP Situation: Deployment pod is down
TIP Short Description: Some fleetman-rest-server pods are not running in in-che-prod01-zone3-zone-control for the past 10 minutes
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn::::is-fleet:::in-che-prod01-zone3-zone-control:microservice:fleetman-rest-server

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    kube_deployment_spec_replicas = 3
    kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready = 0
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'in-che-prod01-zone3-zone-control' and kube_deployment_name = 'fleetman-rest-server'
Scope:
    kube_deployment_name in ('fleetman-rest-server', 'fleetman-metrics', 'fleetman-guardian', 'fleetman-etcdwatch', 'fleetman-bmmon')

Time:             12/09/2025 03:55 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F38614664%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Name:         [genctl-fleetman] Insufficient running pods for deployment
Description:  Some replica pods in the deployment is not running for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    kube_deployment_name in ('fleetman-rest-server', 'fleetman-metrics', 'fleetman-guardian', 'fleetman-etcdwatch', 'fleetman-bmmon')
Segment by:   kube_cluster_name, kube_deployment_name
Alert When:   sum(max(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready)) < min(min(kube_deployment_spec_replicas))
Time Aggregation: 10 m
Alert URL:    https://jp-tok.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/c4d3715d-0da1-4560-b427-a468361b4a5e?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D574049
